item.description:
亚辛塞拉米

发布于 12 月 24 日

  • 一旦暂停，ysellami 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

解除暂停后，ysellami 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

取消发布后，ysellami 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 ysellami 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

笔记：

感谢您保护 DEV 社区 👩‍💻👨‍💻 的安全。 您可以通过以下方式标记 ysellami：

降低 ysellami 的所有帖子的可见度

报告其他不当行为

取消标记 ysellami 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Yassine Sellami

Posted on Dec 24

  • AD: Active Directory, directory service for Windows domain networks.
  • ADFS: Active Directory Federation Services, Federated Identity.
  • DHCP: Dynamic Host Configuration Protocol, automatically assigning IP.
  • DNS: Domain Name System
  • Firebase: Offers NoSQL & real-time hosting of databases, content, social authentication, notifications.
  • FTP: File Transfer Protocol, transfer files from a server to a client on a computer network.
  • GNU: GNU's Not Unix
  • GSM: Global System for Mobile Communications
  • GPU: Graphics Processing Unit
  • GUI: Graphical User Interface
  • HA: High availability
  • HTTP: Hypertext Transfer Protocol
  • HTTPd: Hypertext Transport Protocol Daemon
  • HTTPS: HTTP Secure
  • IPsec: Internet Protocol security
  • IPTV: Internet Protocol Television
  • IPv4: Internet Protocol version 4
  • IPv6: Internet Protocol version 6
  • LDAP: Lightweight Directory Access Protocol
  • J2EE: Java 2 Enterprise Edition
  • J2ME: Java 2 Micro Edition
  • J2SE: Java 2 Standard Edition
  • JAXB: Java Architecture for XML Binding
  • JAX-RPC: Java XML for Remote Procedure Calls
  • JAXP: Java API for XML Processing
  • JCE: Java Cryptography Extension
  • JCP: Java Community Process
  • JDBC: Java Database Connectivity
  • JDK: Java Development Kit
  • JEE: Java Enterprise Edition
  • JDS: Java Desktop System
  • JFC: Java Foundation Classes
  • JFS: IBM Journaling File System
  • JIT: Just-In-Time
  • JME: Java Micro Edition
  • JMX: Java Management Extensions
  • JMS: Java Message Service
  • JNDI: Java Naming and Directory Interface
  • JNI: Java Native Interface
  • JNZ: Jump non-zero
  • JPEG: Joint Photographic Experts Group
  • JRE: Java Runtime Environment
  • JS: JavaScript
  • JSE: Java Standard Edition
  • JSON: JavaScript Object Notation
  • JSP: Jackson Structured Programming
  • JSP: JavaServer Pages
  • JVM: Java Virtual Machine
  • MongoDB: NoSQL & cross-platform document-oriented database program
  • MySQL: Relational database management system
  • NTP: Network Time Protocol - internet protocol used to synchronize with computer clock time sources in a network
  • PostgreSQL: Relational database management system
  • SaaS: Software as a Service
  • SAX: Simple API for XML
  • sbin: superuser binary
  • SFTP: Simple File Transfer Protocol
  • SFTP: SSH File Transfer Protocol
  • SHA: Secure Hash Algorithm

akbarkhushmanov2009 - Dec 24

Once suspended, ysellami will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, ysellami will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by ysellami will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If ysellami is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

Note:

Thanks for keeping DEV Community 👩‍💻👨‍💻 safe. Here is what you can do to flag ysellami:

Make all posts by ysellami less visible

ysellami consistently posts content that violates DEV Community 👩‍💻👨‍💻's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy.

Report other inappropriate conduct

Unflagging ysellami will restore default visibility to their posts.
item.author: ysellami
